entry.title: MÁDARA SOS Rich Hydra-Barrier CICA Cream 40ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Day Cream
Price: 37.90

Instantly sooth and comfort very dry, dehydrated, stressed and reactive skin with this rich hydra-barrier cream. 

Formulated with the hydrating and calming Centella Asiatica (CICA) extract to bolster skin’s protective barrier and help restore the epidermal balance. Hyaluronic acid, soothing bisabolol, nurturing shea butter and repairing ceramides in the formulation help to improve moisture retention, prevent dryness-induced discomfort and signs of premature ageing. Works to diminish the feeling of taut and itchy skin and unveils a better-looking complexion by promoting skin’s healthy radiance.

How to use: Apply a generous amount to clean skin. Use in the morning and night or whenever your skin feels dry, taut and stressed.

Ingredients: ALOE BARBADENSIS (ALOE) LEAF JUICE*; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL*; GLYCERIN; THEOBROMA CACAO (COCOA) SEED BUTTER*; CETEARYL ALCOHOL; PENTYLENE GLYCOL; POLYGLYCERYL-3 STEARATE; BETAINE; SODIUM PCA; CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TRIGLYCERIDE; DICAPRYLYL CARBONATE; ISOAMYL LAURATE; OCTYLDODECANOL; AROMA; IRVINGIA GABONENSIS KERNEL BUTTER; BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII (SHEA) BUTTER*; AQUA; HYDROGENATED COCO-GLYCERIDES; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN OIL; VEGETABLE OIL; XANTHAN GUM; BISABOLOL; HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED WAX; ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) BRAN WAX; RHUS SUCCEDANEA FRUIT WAX; PAEONIA LACTIFLORA (PEONY) ROOT EXTRACT; BORAGO OFFICINALIS (BORAGE) SEED OIL*; CELLULOSE; GLYCOSPHINGOLIPIDS; LACTIC ACID; OENOTHERA BIENNIS (EVENING PRIMROSE) OIL*; RUBUS IDAEUS (RASPBERRY) SEED OIL*; GLYCOLIPIDS; SODIUM PHYTATE; CENTELLA ASIATICA (PENNYWORT) LEAF EXTRACT; ASCORBYL PALMITATE; TOCOPHEROL; HYDROLYZED HYALURONIC ACID; SODIUM HYALURONATE; CI 77491 (IRON OXIDES)***; CITRONELLOL**; GERANIOL**; BENZYL SALICYLATE**; EUGENOL**

*Ingredients from Organic Farming
**From natural essential oils
***Pure mineral pigments

99% Natural origin of total
27% Organic of total

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: BEE IT Face Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Day Cream
Price: 10.00

Moisturizing and anti-age prevention face cream, with a soft and light texture, easy to apply. It has professional efficacy with 100% natural origin active ingredients NaturOxygen® and Pentavitin® EcoCert, Cosmos and Natrue certified, which increase metabolism and skin turnover, making the skin nourished, radiant and even younger. Enriched with Sodium Hyaluronate, Shea butter, Vitamin E, propolis and organic honey.

How to use: Apply and massage with circular movements to regenerate the skin, releasing your emotions.

Ingredients: Aqua, Helianthus annuus (Sunflower) seed oil, Cetearyl alcohol, Prunus amygdalus dulcis (Sweet almond) oil, Ethylhexyl palmitate, Cetearyl glucoside, Sorbitan olivate, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum [Fragrance], Butyrospermum parkii (Shea) butter, Glycerin, Cyamopsis tetragonoloba (guar) gum, Tocopheryl acetate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Citric acid, Coumarin, Limonene, Alpha-isomethyl ionone, Saccharide isomerate, Hydroxycitronellal, Mel/Honey*, Propolis wax, Saccharomyces lysate, Disodium succinate, Sodium citrate, Glutamic acid, Glycine, Threonine, Valine.

* Organic

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: UpCircle Beauty Face Moisturiser with Vitamin E + Aloe Vera - Travel Size 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: UpCircle Beauty
Type: Day Cream
Price: 14.90

This multi award-winning vegan face moisturiser is suitable for all skin types. Vitamin E rich argan powder is combined with skin-soothing cocoa butter, aloe vera and blood orange.

Inspiring, upcycling, uplifting: This dermatologically approved face cream is made with finely-ground powder of discarded argan shells, a natural by-product of the argan oil industry and rich in antioxidant Vitamin E.

Winner of the "Responsible Beauty" award in the CEW Awards 2022, "Best Moisturiser" in the Natural Health Beauty Awards 2021. Winner in the Beauty Shortlist Awards 2021.

An UpCircle Bestseller now perfectly packaged into a 30ml travel friendly format, great for any getaway.

How to use: Apply to clean, dry skin. Massage in until the cream absorbs. Suitable for all skin types and for daily use.

Ingredients: Aqua, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Glycerin, C14-22 Alcohols, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil*, Vitis Vinifera (Grape) Seed Oil, Cucumis Sativus (Cucumber) Fruit Extract*, Xanthan Gum, Coffea Arabica (Coffee) Seed Extract, Acer Rubrum (Maple) Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Calendula Officinalis Extract*, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Extract*, Anthemis Nobilis (Chamomile) Flower Oil, Tocopherol, Sodium Hydroxide, C12-20 Alkyl Glucoside, Potassium Sorbate, Sorbic Acid, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Salicylic Acid, Benzyl Alcohol, Limonene**. 

*Organically grown ingredients

**Natural constituent of essential oils listed.

99% NATURAL INGREDIENTS

Handmade | Social Good | Recycled Materials | Zero Waste | Cruelty Free | Vegan | Natural Resources | Non Toxic

entry.title: BERRICHI Light Natural Glow Cream REFILL 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Day Cream
Price: 24.90

Discover Berrichi face cream Light – natural radiance and balance for your skin. Face cream Light is a light and silky cream designed to moisturise and protect combination and normal skin on a daily basis. It helps to restore the skin’s natural moisture balance, evens the texture and supports the skin’s natural defences, leaving skin radiant and soft.

Berrichi Light Natural Glow Cream:

  • Light and fast-absorbing texture that does not clog pores
  • Deep moisturising action that restores the skin’s moisture balance
  • Soothes irritations and soothes inflamed skin
  • Smoothes the skin tone, reducing wrinkles and pigmentation.
  • Anti-ageing

Main ingredients:

  • Furcellaran – antioxidant, helps to maintain skin moisture balance and strengthen the skin’s protective barrier, slows down the skin’s ageing process, reduces inflammation and dryness. Furtsellaran is obtained from algae grown in Estonian waters.
  • Astaxanthin – an antioxidant, the most effective natural anti-ageing agent with the ability to penetrate cell membranes, affecting the skin deeply. Stimulates the production of collagen, balances the skin’s moisture levels, protects the skin from central irritants.
  • Aloe Vera – antioxidant, antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties that accelerate healing, moisturise the skin and prevent ageing.
  • Rough Razor Beard – with antibacterial properties, it helps soothe and protect the skin, promoting a smoother, brighter complexion.

For combined and normal skin. Recommended for age 25+

How to use: Apply to clean skin or over serum. Suitable as a foundation for make-up, it can also be used at night.

Ingredients: Aqua, Persea Gratissima oil (Organic Avocado Oil)*, Prunus Armeniaca kernel oil (Organic Apricot kernel oil)*, Caryodendron Orinocense seed oil (Cacay Oil), Simmondsia Chinesis seed oil (Organic Jojoba oil)*, Cetearyl Olivate/Sorbitan Olivate (Olivem1000), Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin**, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice/Potassium Sorbate/Sodium Benzoate/Citric acid (Aloe Vera), Dehydroacetic Acid/Benzoic Acid/Benzyl Alcohol/Sorbic Acid (Sharomix705), Helianthus Annuus Seed oil/Polyglyceryl-3 Palmitate/Usnea Barbata extract (Usnea Barbata), Furcellaria Lumbricalis extract (Furcellaran), Haemotococcus pluvialis/Tocopherol (Astaxanthin oil)

*Ingredients from organic farming
**Made using organic ingredients

Free from parabens, silicones, mineral oils, synthetic flavours and colourants. Cruelty free and vegan. Suitable for sensitive and allergic skin.

entry.title: BERRICHI Age Defence Day Cream REFILL 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Day Cream
Price: 24.90

Berrichi day cream Day is the ideal solution for daily moisturizing and protecting the skin. This silky cream soothes irritated skin, reduces redness and protects against external stressors. It restores the skin’s natural moisture balance and elasticity, leaving it looking radiant and healthy.

Berrichi  Age Defence Day Cream:

  • Moisturises deeply
  • Makes the skin soft and supple
  • Reduces redness and inflammation by soothing sensitive skin
  • Smoothes the skin tone, reducing wrinkles and pigmentation.
  • Protects the skin from external environmental factors

Main ingredients:

  • Furcellaran– antioxidant, helps to maintain skin moisture balance and strengthen the skin’s protective barrier, slows down the skin’s ageing process, reduces inflammation and dryness. Furtsellaran is obtained from algae grown in Estonian waters.
  • Astaxanthin – an antioxidant, the most effective natural anti-ageing agent with the ability to penetrate cell membranes, affecting the skin deeply. Stimulates the production of collagen, balances the skin’s moisture levels, protects the skin from central irritants.
  • Aloe Vera – antioxidant, antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties that accelerate healing, moisturise the skin and prevent ageing.
  • Cacay oil – rich in vitamins A and E. Helps reduce wrinkles and improve skin elasticity, stimulating collagen production and cell renewal.

For dry and normal skin. Recommended for age 25+

How to use: Apply to clean skin or over serum. Suitable as a foundation for make-up, it can also be used at night. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Persea Gratissima oil (Organic Avocado Oil)*, Prunus Armeniaca kernel oil (Organic Apricot kernel oil)*, Caryodendron Orinocense seed oil (Cacay Oil), Aleurites Moluccana seed oil (Kukui nut oil), Cetearyl Olivate/Sorbitan Olivate (Olivem1000), Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin**, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice/Potassium Sorbate/Sodium Benzoate/Citric acid (Aloe Vera), Dehydroacetic Acid/Benzoic Acid/Benzyl Alcohol/Sorbic Acid (Sharomix705), Furcellaria Lumbricalis extract (Furcellaran), Haemotococcus pluvialis/Tocopherol (Astaxanthin oil).

Free from parabens, silicones, mineral oils, synthetic flavours and colourants. Cruelty free and vegan. Suitable for sensitive and allergic skin.

entry.title: BERRICHI Age Defence Face Cream for Men REFILL 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Day Cream
Price: 24.90

Face cream For Men contains powerful antioxidants furcellaran and astaxanthin, which anti-aging and deep moisturizing effect has been confirmed in many scientific studies. We get furcellaran from algae grown in Estonian waters, astaxanthin from other clean and Nordic sea plants.

Astaxanthin acts as if on the skin natural doping. This powerful antioxidant can penetrate cell membranes, affecting the skin deeply. The humidity level balances and premature wrinkles generation decreases. The skin is protected from the attack of UV rays and free radicals.

The cream is well suited for after-shave care.

Berrichi Age Defence Face Cream for Men:

  • Deep moisturizing
  • Anti-aging
  • Reduces dryness and scar tissue.
  • Suitable for after-shave care.
  • With light absorption.
  • Contains furcellaran, astaxanthin, aloe vera, cacay-oil.

From the Amazon rainforest cacay– oil improves skin elasticity and evens skin tone. Aloe soothes and relieves irritations.

For all skin types. 

How to use: Apply to clean skin or over serum. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Persea Gratissima oil (Organic Avocado Oil)*, Prunus Armeniaca kernel oil (Organic Apricot kernel oil)*, Caryodendron Orinocense seed oil (Cacay Oil), Cetearyl Olivate/Sorbitan Olivate (Olivem1000), Cetearyl Alcohol, ), Simmondsia Chinesis seed oil (Organic Jojoba oil)*, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice/Potassium Sorbate/Sodium Benzoate/Citric acid (Aloe Vera), Glycerin**, Dehydroacetic Acid/Benzoic Acid/Benzyl Alcohol/Sorbic Acid (Sharomix705), Furcellaria Lumbricalis extract (Furcellaran), Haemotococcus pluvialis/Tocopherol (Astaxanthin oil)

Free from parabens, silicones, mineral oils, synthetic flavours and colourants. Cruelty free and vegan. Suitable for sensitive and allergic skin.

entry.title: BERRICHI Age Defence Face Cream for Men 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Day Cream
Price: 30.90

Face cream For Men contains powerful antioxidants furcellaran and astaxanthin, which anti-aging and deep moisturizing effect has been confirmed in many scientific studies. We get furcellaran from algae grown in Estonian waters, astaxanthin from other clean and Nordic sea plants.

Astaxanthin acts as if on the skin natural doping. This powerful antioxidant can penetrate cell membranes, affecting the skin deeply. The humidity level balances and premature wrinkles generation decreases. The skin is protected from the attack of UV rays and free radicals.

The cream is well suited for after-shave care.

Berrichi Age Defence Face Cream for Men:

  • Deep moisturizing
  • Anti-aging
  • Reduces dryness and scar tissue.
  • Suitable for after-shave care.
  • With light absorption.
  • Contains furcellaran, astaxanthin, aloe vera, cacay-oil.

From the Amazon rainforest cacay– oil improves skin elasticity and evens skin tone. Aloe soothes and relieves irritations.

For all skin types.

Ingredients: Aqua, Persea Gratissima oil (Organic Avocado Oil)*, Prunus Armeniaca kernel oil (Organic Apricot kernel oil)*, Caryodendron Orinocense seed oil (Cacay Oil), Cetearyl Olivate/Sorbitan Olivate (Olivem1000), Cetearyl Alcohol, ), Simmondsia Chinesis seed oil (Organic Jojoba oil)*, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice/Potassium Sorbate/Sodium Benzoate/Citric acid (Aloe Vera), Glycerin**, Dehydroacetic Acid/Benzoic Acid/Benzyl Alcohol/Sorbic Acid (Sharomix705), Furcellaria Lumbricalis extract (Furcellaran), Haemotococcus pluvialis/Tocopherol (Astaxanthin oil)

The glass bottle and pump system are reusable.

Free from parabens, silicones, mineral oils, synthetic flavours and colourants. Cruelty free and vegan. Suitable for sensitive and allergic skin.

entry.summary:
Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Day Cream
Price: 30.90

Discover Berrichi face cream Light – natural radiance and balance for your skin. Face cream Light is a light and silky cream designed to moisturise and protect combination and normal skin on a daily basis. It helps to restore the skin’s natural moisture balance, evens the texture and supports the skin’s natural defences, leaving skin radiant and soft.

Berrichi Light Natural Glow Cream:

  • Light and fast-absorbing texture that does not clog pores
  • Deep moisturising action that restores the skin’s moisture balance
  • Soothes irritations and soothes inflamed skin
  • Smoothes the skin tone, reducing wrinkles and pigmentation.
  • Anti-ageing

The glass bottle and pump system are reusable.

Vendor: Berrichi
Type: Day Cream
Price: 30.90

Berrichi day cream Day is the ideal solution for daily moisturizing and protecting the skin. This silky cream soothes irritated skin, reduces redness and protects against external stressors. It restores the skin’s natural moisture balance and elasticity, leaving it looking radiant and healthy.

Berrichi  Age Defence Day Cream:

  • Moisturises deeply
  • Makes the skin soft and supple
  • Reduces redness and inflammation by soothing sensitive skin
  • Smoothes the skin tone, reducing wrinkles and pigmentation.
  • Protects the skin from external environmental factors

Main ingredients:

The glass bottle and pump system are reusable.

entry.title: MÁDARA Vitamin C Illuminating Recovery Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Day Cream
Price: 40.90

​Treat your skin with this glow-enhancing moisturiser that instantly revives dull and tired complexion, promoting more even skin tone. Formulated with a stabilised form of Vitamin C, a potent antioxidant, used in skincare and dermatology to brighten, improve skin tone and promote a healthy glow, it also helps to prevent hyperpigmentation and dark spots. Hyaluronic acid ensures intense hydration, whilst the seaweed extract boosts the brightening effect, leaving the skin feeling softer and smoother and looking youthfully fresh and beautifully radiant.

How to use: Apply daily on clean skin. Recommended to use daily or as a treatment course 2–3 times a year. Avoid direct sun exposure after the application. Use sunscreen afterwards.

Ingredients: Aqua, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Pentylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Ascorbyl Glucoside, Isoamyl Laurate, Betaine, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Sodium PCA, Aroma, Potassium Hydroxide, Palmitic acid, Stearic Acid, Sodium Citrate, Xanthan Gum, Rubus Chamaemorus (Cloudberry) Fruit Extract, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium phytate, Ascophyllum Nodosum (Brown Algae) Extract, Citric acid, CI 77492 (Iron Oxides), Limonene, Citronellol, Linalool, Geraniol, Citral

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA Vitamin C Illuminating Recovery Cream 15ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Day Cream
Price: 13.90

​Treat your skin with this glow-enhancing moisturiser that instantly revives dull and tired complexion, promoting more even skin tone. Formulated with a stabilised form of Vitamin C, a potent antioxidant, used in skincare and dermatology to brighten, improve skin tone and promote a healthy glow, it also helps to prevent hyperpigmentation and dark spots. Hyaluronic acid ensures intense hydration, whilst the seaweed extract boosts the brightening effect, leaving the skin feeling softer and smoother and looking youthfully fresh and beautifully radiant.

How to use: Apply daily on clean skin. Recommended to use daily or as a treatment course 2–3 times a year. Avoid direct sun exposure after the application. Use sunscreen afterwards.

Ingredients: Aqua, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Pentylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Ascorbyl Glucoside, Isoamyl Laurate, Betaine, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Sodium PCA, Aroma, Potassium Hydroxide, Palmitic acid, Stearic Acid, Sodium Citrate, Xanthan Gum, Rubus Chamaemorus (Cloudberry) Fruit Extract, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium phytate, Ascophyllum Nodosum (Brown Algae) Extract, Citric acid, CI 77492 (Iron Oxides), Limonene, Citronellol, Linalool, Geraniol, Citral

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: NURME Neroli Hydrating Day Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Day Cream
Price: 27.50

This moisturizing day cream provides long-lasting hydration for dry and stressed skin throughout the day. A powerful blend of antioxidants and restorative ingredients leaves the skin soft and smooth while helping to prevent signs of aging.

Neroli oil, derived from bitter orange blossoms, has strong antimicrobial and antibacterial properties, making it beneficial for acne-prone skin and clogged pores. It regulates sebum production, balancing oily skin. Rich in antioxidants and vitamin E, neroli oil offers anti-aging and anti-acne benefits, reducing inflammation and redness.

This product is packaged in a recyclable polypropylene airless bottle. The airless packaging prevents air exposure, ensuring microbiological purity and extending the shelf life of natural cosmetics.

How to use: Apply to clean skin.  Allow to absorb completely. Can be used under makeup or alone.

Ingredients: Aqua*, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Flower Water*, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil*, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil*, Glycerin**, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter*, Betain**, Polyglyceryl-3 Methylglucose Distearate*, Glyceryl Stearate**, Cetearyl Alcohol**, Myristyl Myristate**, Sodium Levulinate**, Panthenol*, Sodium Anisate**, Ascorbyl Palmitate**, Benzyl Alcohol**, Lactic Acid**, Sodium Hyaluronate**, Allantoin*, Sodium Benzoate**, Tocopherol**, Potassium Sorbate**, Xanthan Gum**, Hectorite**, Cellulose**, Passiflora Incarnata Extract*, Citrus Aurantium Flower Oil*, Limonene***, Linalool***.

* Natural origin
**Natural cosmetics approved ingredient
***Occurs naturally in essential oils

entry.title: NAIF Nurturing Day Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Day Cream
Price: 23.90

The multitasking Naïf Nurturing Day Cream hydrates and protects face, neck and décolleté during the day from the harmful effects of UV radiation. Al this thanks to the added tomato extract. To support the natural skin process, the day cream contains natural oils, such as avocado and almond oil.

The day cream is quickly absorbed and you don't need much of it. That's why you'll be able to use the bioplastic tube's content even longer. All Naïf products are vegan, made with a gentle fragrance, are dermatologically tested and do not contain the 26 most common allergens.

How to use: Apply the Nurturing Day Cream evenly (you don't need much) to a cleansed face, neck and décolleté.

The natural SPF6 from tomato extract provides for protection against harmful UV rays.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Glycerin, Methylpropanediol, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Cetearyl Alcohol, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Oil, Sucrose Stearate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Linum Usitatissimum (Linseed Seed) Oil, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Solanum Lycopersicum (Tomato Fruit/Leaf/Stem) Extract, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary Leaf) Extract, Tocopherol, Caprylyl Glycol, Phenylpropanol, Xanthan Gum, Parfum/Fragrance, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: HEJ Organic Naked Instant Pore Refining Face Cream 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Day Cream
Price: 15.40

Naked is a fragrance-free skincare line with highly effective and 100% natural ingredients.

Whether as a face cream or primer, Naked Instant Pore Refining Face Cream's natural pigments give you an even complexion. Azelaic acid has a regulating effect on sebum production, cleanses the pores and effectively prevents skin impurities.

The first Nature certified product with azelaic acid.

  • Gives an even complexion and new elasticity
  • Squalane provides moisture and protects against environmental influences
  • Azelaic acid has an antibacterial effect and reduces redness and inflammation
  • Particularly suitable for impure, oily and combination skin  
  • 100% fragrance-free and natural 

How to use: Apply it to your face in the morning and evening after cleansing and massage in gently. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil*, Cetyl Alcohol, Sodium Potassium Aluminium Silicate, Caprylyl Caprylate/Caprate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Betaine, Acelaic Acid, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter*, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil*, Squalane, Sodium Hyaluronate, Prunus Armeniaca Fruit Extract*, Chondrus Crispus Powder, Acmella Oleracea Extract, Sodium Levulinate, Sodium Benzoate, Glucomannan, CI 77891, Silica, Sodium Stearoyl Glutamate, Sodium Anisate,Tocopherol, Sodium Hydroxide

* from certified organic agriculture

entry.title: HEJ Organic Naked Barrier Repair Face Cream 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Day Cream
Price: 17.50

Naked is a fragrance-free skincare line with highly effective and 100% natural ingredients.

The Naked Barrier Repair Face Cream helps your skin build its natural barrier and protect it from environmental influences. Ceramides and ectoine strengthen your skin and support its regeneration.

Fermented ingredients protect your skin with valuable antioxidants and vitamins. They are particularly gentle and skin-friendly because they have been fermented in olive brine, not in alcohol. 

  • Strengthens the natural skin barrier
  • Ceramides and ectoine protect against environmental influences and provide moisture
  • Rich care that melts on the skin
  • Suitable for all skin types 
  • 100% fragrance-free and natural  

How to use: Apply to the face, neck and décolleté morning and evening as a final treatment.

Ingredients: Aqua (Water), Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil*, Glycerin, Betaine, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Pentylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Squalane, Ectoin, Propanediol, Glyceryl Stearate, Jojoba Esters, Saccharide Isomerate, Benzyl Alcohol, Bisabolol, Xanthan Gum, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Wax, Sodium Stearoyl Glutamate, Tocopherol, Lactobacillus Ferment Lysate, Ceramide Np, Sodium Hyaluronate, Dehydroacetic Acid, Polyglycerin-3, Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Sodium Hydroxide

*ingredients from certified organic agriculture

entry.title: HEJ Organic The Protector SPF30 Face Cream 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Day Cream
Price: 14.90

Protects your skin every day and in all weathers with SPF30 and thus counteract premature skin aging. Mineral UV filter protects you from UVA and UVB rays without any whitening. The Protector Face Cream's quickly absorbed texture is light and moisturizing.

  • Light day care with SPF30 for all skin types
  • Mineral UV filter absorbs quickly without whitening
  • Vitamin C and hyaluronic acid protect the skin and moisturize
  • Now even more sustainable: Aluminum tube (100% recyclable) for complete emptying of the product
  • 100% vegan and natural

How to use: Apply me to your face, neck and décolleté in the morning, as well as every now and then if you spend a long time outdoors.

Ingredients: Aqua, Opuntia Ficus-Indica Flower Extract*, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Titanium Dioxide, Glycine Soja Oil*, Glyceryl Citrate/Lactate/Linoleate/Oleate, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter*, Zinc Oxide, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil*, Pongamia Glabra Seed Oil*, Glycerin, Opuntia Ficus-Indica Seed Oil*, Sodium Hyaluronate, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil*, Citrus Paradisi Fruit Extract*, Tocopherol, Polyglyceryl-2 Dipolyhydroxystearate, Polyglyceryl-3 Diisostearate, Sodium PCA, Sorbitol, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Hydrogenated Coco-Glycerides, Acacia Senegal Gum, Alumina, Lauroyl Lysine, Xanthan Gum, Levulinic Acid, Cetearyl Alcohol, p-Anisic Acid, Glyceryl Caprylate, Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Glyceryl Stearate, Parfum**, Citral**, Citronellol*, Limonene*, Linalool**

*ingredients from certified organic agriculture
**natural essential oils

entry.title: MÁDARA Hydra-Derm Balancing Fluid 40ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Day Cream
Price: 22.90

This light-weight face moisturiser intensely hydrates and balances, ensuring lasting comfort and helping to improve the condition of problem-prone skin. Helps to tighten pores and minimise the appearance of breakouts.

Formulated with moisturising hyaluronic acid and fermented polysaccharides that regulate the microbiome for a clear and healthy-looking complexion. Juniper stem sells and extracts of lichen and mate tea deliver strong soothing and antioxidant benefits. Targets both teenage and adult acne.

How to use: Apply to clean skin every morning and night. Use in combination with other ACNE formulas for the best results.

Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Pentylene Glycol, Polyglyceryl-6 Stearate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cellulose, Sodium PCA, Isoamyl Laurate, Zinc PCA, Aroma, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Propanediol, Polyglyceryl-6 Behenate, Alcohol, Xanthan Gum, Ilex Paraguariensis (Mate) Leaf Extract, Palmitic acid, Stearic Acid, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Tocopherol, Potassium Hydroxide, Sodium phytate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Cetraria Islandica (Iceland Moss) Extract, Usnea Barbata (Lichen) Extract, Rhamnose, Juniperus Communis (Juniper) Callus Culture Extract, CI 77007 (Ultramarines), Glucose, Glucuronic Acid, Silica, Kaolin, Maltodextrin, CI 75815 (Chlorophyllin Copper Complex), Linalool, Citral, Limonene, Citronellol

* Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA SPF30 Plant Stem Cell Age-Defying Face Sunscreen 40ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Suncreen
Price: 32.90

Ingredients from natural origin meet cellular biology to create this break-through daily sunscreen that provides high level protection with an invisible, flawless nude skin finish. 

Innovative formula with patent pending stem cells from Northern Dragonhead deliver a hyper dose of antioxidants to completely shield the skin from urban pollution while also regenerating and protecting the skin microbiome for an age-defying effect.

The ultra-light, subtly tinted texture infused with hyaluronic acid and SPF-boosting raspberry seed oil glides onto the skin easily, leaving no white marks. Utmost protection for a forever sun kissed look.

How to use: Apply to clean skin or over your daily moisturiser. Reapply if necessary during the day.

Ingredients: Zinc Oxide, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe) Leaf Juice, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Isoamyl Laurate, Lecithin, Polyglyceryl-3 ricinoleate, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Sorbitan olivate, Aqua, CI 77891 (Titanium Dioxide), Oryza Sativa (Rice) Bran Oil, Vegetable Oil, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Wax, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Bran Wax, Rhus Succedanea Fruit Wax, Hydrated Silica, Aroma, Sodium Chloride, Xanthan Gum, Sorbitan Caprylate, Jojoba Esters, Citric acid, Propanediol, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Dracocephalum Ruyschiana (Dragonhead) Cell Culture Extract, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Rubus Idaeus (Raspberry) Seed Oil, Caprylyl glycol, Benzoic Acid, Tocopherol, Ascorbyl Palmitate, CI 77491 (Iron Oxides), CI 77492 (Iron Oxides), CI 77499 (Iron Oxides), Sodium phytate, Camellia Sinensis (Green Tea) Leaf Extract, Quercus Robur (Oak) Bark Extract, Vitis Vinifera (Grape) Seed Extract, Isostearic Acid, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate, Sodium Benzoate, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate, Potassium Sorbate, Propylene Glycol, Limonene, Benzyl Salicylate, Citral, Linalool, Eugenol

* Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA SOS Hydra Recharge Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Day Cream
Price: 37.90

SOS Hydra Recharge Cream, intense moisture-locking cream infused with age-defying antioxidants of peony, linseed and hyaluronic acid. Hydrates, replenishes and calms dehydrated and stressed skin to restore youthful radiance. Acting as a protective layer against environmental damage, this soft-textured cream reduces the look of fine lines, and promotes optimal hydration.

How to use: Apply to clean skin every morning and evening or whenever your skin feels thirsty or stressed. For the best results, use in combination with SOS Hydra Repair Intensive Serum.

Ingredients: Aqua, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Glyceryl Stearate, Behenyl Alcohol, Isoamyl Laurate, Rosa Damascena (Rose) Flower Water, Hippophae Rhamnoides (Sea Buckthorn) Fruit Extract, Sodium PCA, Sodium levulinate, Aroma, Cetearyl Alcohol, Lecithin, Cellulose, Sodium anisate, Palmitic acid, Stearic Acid, Lactic Acid, Glycine Soja Sterols, Linum Usitatissimum (Flax) Seed Extract, Urtica Dioica (Nettle) Leaf Extract, Xanthan Gum, Paeonia Lactiflora (Peony) Root Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium phytate, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Tocopherol, CI 77491 (Iron Oxides), Benzyl Alcohol, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Citronellol, Geraniol, Benzyl Salicylate, Eugenol

* Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: MÁDARA SOS+ Sensitive Moisturiser 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Day Cream
Price: 39.90

This lightweight moisturiser improves the hydration of sensitive, easily irritated, redness-prone skin. Biotechnologically obtained molecules of seaweed work to balance the skin's microbiome and reinforce its natural protection against external stressors. Minimises the appearance of redness and burning.

How to use: Apply to clean skin daily. Use in combination with MÁDARA SOS+ Sensitive Night Cream for the best results.

Ingredients: Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe) Leaf Juice, Glycerin, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Pentylene Glycol, Polyglyceryl-3 Stearate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Sodium PCA, Coco- Caprylate, Isoamyl Laurate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Aqua, Hydrolyzed Rhodophyceae Extract, Octyldodecanol, Xanthan Gum, Cellulose, Irvingia gabonensis kernel butter, Potassium Hydroxide, Sodium Hyaluronate, Hydrogenated Coco-glycerides, Tocopherol, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Sodium phytate, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid

* Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: HEJ Organic The Reactivator Face Fluid Cactus 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Day Cream
Price: 17.90

The Face Fluid pampers you and your skin, provides long-lasting moisture and ensures a unique, light care experience after daily cleansing. Prickly pear seed oil and argan oil also protect your skin from external influences and make a valuable contribution to a fresh, young complexion.

  • Lightweight moisturizer
  • Quickly absorbed texture that does not overload oily skin
  • Ideal base for make-up
  • Skin type: Any skin
  • 100% vegan and natural

Prickly Pear Oil helps to regenerate the cells and keeps your skin youthful.

Prickly Pear Blossom Water brings a combination of essential fatty acids to your skin care.

Argan Oil is the Moroccan secret to smooth, soft skin.

Grapefruit Extract is a natural antibiotic to promote clear skin.

How to use: Apply to face morning and evening after cleansing. Also suitable as a base under make-up

Ingredients: Aqua, Opuntia Ficus-Indica Flower Extract*, Glycine Soja Oil*, Caprylic/ Capric Triglyceride, Glycerin, Isoamyl Laurate, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil*, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil*, Olea Europaea Fruit Oil*, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil*, Citrus Paradisi Fruit Extract*, Opuntia Ficus-Indica Seed Oil*, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter*, Amorphophallus Konjac Root Extract*, Mangifera Indica Seed Butter*, Cetyl Alcohol, Levulinic Acid, Acacia Senegal Gum, Xanthan Gum, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil*, Glyceryl Caprylate, Sodium Hyaluronate, p-Anisic Acid, Parfum**, Citral**, Citronellol**, Limonene**, Linalool** *ingredients from certified organic agriculture, **natural essential oils

Organic | Cruelty Free | Vegan | Natural Resources

entry.title: HEJ Organic Organic Sensitive 24h Face Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Day Cream
Price: 17.90

Simply a delicate all-rounder that provides intensive moisture and ensures radiant skin. Rich and quickly absorbed texture ensures that the skin feels pleasant, no matter what time of day.

  • Promotes the balance of your skin barrier and deeply hydrates
  • Quickly absorbed texture
  • Natural power active ingredient complex made from hemp oil, oat and chamomile extract
  • Skin type: Especially for sensitive skin
  • Allergen-reduced perfume oil, 100% vegan and natural

Hemp Oil contains important Omega-6 fatty acids, promotes cell regeneration and protects the skin without feeling greasy.

Oat Extract has an anti-inflammatory and calming effect and is particularly suitable for sensitive skin.

Chamomile Flower Water has soothing and antibacterial characteristics and provides intensive hydration to the skin.

How to use: Apply to your face morning and evening after cleansing

Ingredients: Aqua, Prunus Armeniaca Kernel Oil, Glycerin, Polyglyceryl-3 Dicitrate/Stearate, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil*, Cetearyl Alcohol, Distarch Phosphate, Cannabis Sativa Seed Oil*, Hydrogenated Rapeseed Oil, Candelilla Cera, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract*, Hypericum Perforatum Extract*, Avena Sativa Kernel Extract*, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Levulinate, Sodium Anisate, Alcohol, Tocopherol, Citric Acid, Parfum** *ingredients from certified organic agriculture, **natural essential oils

Organic | Cruelty Free | Vegan | Natural Resources

entry.title: NorrSkin Highly Nourishing Face Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: bioskina
Type: Day Cream
Price: 35.00

Nourishes & moisturises, supports hydro lipid barrier in the skin. Soothing effect, prevents skin irritation.

Benefits: 

  • Visibly improves skin texture in 14 days (confirmed by clinical tests)
  • Deeply nourishes with power of Niacinamide and Linseed
  • Prevents skin dryness and dehydration with plant derived squalane
  • Rich in vitamins and minerals (calcium, magnesium & Zinc)
  • It reduces the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles
  • It soothes skin and prevents irritations

Squalane protects the skin from water loss. Deeply moisturises the skin, has a mild formula, making it suitable for sensitive skin, regulates production of sebum, has a strong anti-aging effect.

Niacinamide, also knows as Vitamin B3 and strong antioxidant, has a cleaning, detoxifying and brightening properties. Decreases redness and irritations on the skin. Stimulates elasticity.

Linseed Oil is extra-rich, plant-derived source of Omega-3 fatty acids. Provides a nourishing lipid barrier.

96,3% natural origin ingredients, dermatologically tested.

How to use: Apply a small amount of the cream on your face and neck. Gently massage the cream into the skin.

Ingredients: Aqua, Squalane, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate, Cetearyl Olivate, Linum Usitatissimum Seed Oil, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Sorbitan Olivate, Cetearyl Alcohol, 1,2-Hexanediol, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Niacinamide, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil, Arginine, Fragaria Vesca Fruit Extract, Linum Usitatissimum Seed Extract, Oryza Sativa Bran Wax, Centella Asiatica Root Extract, Panthenol, Pantolactone, Stearic Acid, Lactic Acid, Parfum, Xanthan Gum, Hydroxyacetophenone, Sodium Phytate, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Linalool, Citronellol, Hexyl Cinnamal.  

Natural Certified | Clean Certified | Vegan Certified

Inspired by Hälsingland, Sweden.

NorrSkin plants 1 tree for every product sold.

entry.title: Vielö Organic Day Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: vielö
Type: Day Cream
Price: 52.00

Nourishing organic day cream to deliver long-lasting hydration, leaving the skin soft and smooth.

Created with organic whey (nourishing), hyaluronic acid (hydrating), organic apricot kernel oil (nurturing) and organic extracts of chamomile (soothing), pansy (protecting) and arnica (anti-inflammatory).

Suitable for all skin types, also for dry and sensitive skin.

How to Use: Massage gently into freshly cleansed skin and neck. Use it in the morning and evening and whenever your skin needs natural hydration. Perfect as make-up base.

Ingredients: Lactis Serum Proteinum**, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate*, Prunus Armeniaca Kernel Oil**, Glycerin**, Aqua*, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Cetyl Alcohol*, Rosa Canina Fruit Oil**, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter**, Sodium Levulinate*, Glyceryl Caprylate*, Sodium Hyaluronate*, Xanthan Gum*, Sodium Anisate, Tocopherol*, Lavandula Angustifolia Flower Oil**, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid*, Salvia Officinalis Oil**, Citronellol**/***, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil**, Polyglyceryl-4 Caprate*, Viola Tricolor Extract**, Malva Sylvestris Flower Extract**, Arnica Montana Flower Extract**, Matricaria Chamomilla Flower Extract**, Geraniol**/***, Sodium Lactate*, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract**, Limonene**/***, Citral**/***.

* from natural origin (99,7%)
** certified organic (85,3%)
*** from natural essential oils

Handmade in Austria

Inspired by circular economy, Vielö refines a high-quality by-product of cheese production, liquid organic whey, and uses it to create certified organic and sustainable skin and body care products.
